findings.title: Guest · mobile — payment succeeds in the UI but fails on the server
findings.consequence: Customer believes they paid → support ticket + chargeback risk
findings.evidence: POST /api/pay → 500 (network trace); UI still advances to the "Thank you" screen
findings.fix: Gate the success screen on a 2xx + a persisted order id
findings.verify: Force a 500 and confirm the UI shows a recoverable error and writes no order

findings.title: No path exists to cancel an order after purchase
findings.evidence: Full surface map — no route, button, or setting reaches cancellation
findings.fix: Add a cancel affordance on the order-detail screen (smallest viable path)
findings.verify: Place an order, cancel it, confirm state + refund hook fire

findings.title: Coupon field silently ignores invalid codes instead of explaining
findings.consequence: Users retry the same bad code and abandon; looks broken
findings.evidence: 3 invalid codes → no message, no error state, field just clears
findings.fix: Return an inline validation message and keep the entered value

findings.title: Address form loses state on browser back
findings.evidence: Single repro on Chrome: back button clears 6 fields
findings.fix: Persist form state to session on change

findings.title: Order confirmation email not verified (prod-only path avoided)
findings.evidence: Avoided to prevent sending real email; logged as evidence debt
findings.fix: Add a sandbox email sink to exercise this path in the audit

findings.title: Empty-cart checkout shows a spinner with no end state
findings.evidence: Single repro: /checkout with 0 items spins indefinitely
findings.fix: Redirect empty-cart checkout to the cart with a message

omitted: load test (no safe env) → logged as evidence debt, NOT as "passed"
